criteria.name: Visual Hierarchy & Layout
criteria.definition: Whether information priority is visually organized; whether grid, whitespace, alignment, and balance are deliberately controlled.

anchors.1: Elements are disorganized; no readable visual flow; alignment and spacing uncontrolled.
anchors.4: Basic alignment and balance present, but hierarchy is flat and contrast weak.
anchors.7: Visual flow is clearly designed; grid, whitespace, and emphasis are precisely controlled.

criteria.name: Typography
criteria.definition: Whether typeface choice, hierarchy, spacing, and readability are appropriate and aligned with message and tone.

anchors.1: Poor readability; no typographic hierarchy; mismatched with tone.
anchors.4: Readable but conventional typeface use; monotonous hierarchy.
anchors.7: Typeface choice, hierarchy, and spacing are refined and actively reinforce the message tone.

criteria.name: Color
criteria.definition: Whether the palette's harmony, contrast, and consistency are appropriate and contribute to meaning and hierarchy.

anchors.1: Color use is arbitrary; contrast and harmony broken; interferes with message.
anchors.4: Palette is acceptable but color does not actively contribute to communication.
anchors.7: Palette is harmonious, contrast controlled, reinforcing hierarchy and meaning.

criteria.name: Concept & Communication
criteria.definition: Whether the theme/message is communicated clearly; whether the concept is original and effectively translated into visual language.

anchors.1: Message is unclear; concept is cliched or disconnected from the visuals.
anchors.4: Message comes across but the concept is ordinary with much room for interpretation.
anchors.7: Message is clear; concept is original and persuasively realized in visual language.

criteria.name: Craft & Finish
criteria.definition: Whether production quality (finishing, precision, consistency) is high and detailing is professional.

anchors.1: Rough finishing; multiple errors/inconsistencies; feels unfinished.
anchors.4: Generally tidy but partial finishing/consistency issues.
anchors.7: Finishing and detailing are precise and consistent, showing professional craft.
